ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange the stock is listed on */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company operates in */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is based */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Security Identification Procedures number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock exchange is based */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock exchange operates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the price record belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the given date */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend paid on the given date */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Stock split ratio on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the analysis result belongs to */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "indicator" TEXT /* Technical indicator used in the analysis (e.g., moving average, RSI) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the news article is related to */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "article" TEXT /* Text of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was made */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per share */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission paid for the trade */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees paid for the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_stock_watchlist" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the stock to their watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being watched */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was added to the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stock_watchlist_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stock_watchlist_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the technical indicator belongs to */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator (e.g., moving average, RSI) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technical indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
